downgrade.reason: Bug already fixed in commit 7a36784; historical finding, not active issue
Personal site with 7-minute fix time; CI validation disproportionate for one-person portfolio
Charts degrade but navigation and static content still work; supplementary visualization, not total failure
Summary cards, tables all render; only chart fails; page has WIP banner; future data migration is speculative
XSS risk is theoretical; data source is inline DUMMY_DATA controlled by site owner; future migration not yet implemented
GitHub Pages pins gem versions server-side; excluding Gemfile.lock is standard practice for Pages sites
Greedy navigation is intended theme behavior; hamburger menu is a standard responsive design pattern
Both pages accessible via top navigation on every page; cross-links are a minor UX suggestion
13-line YAML file maintained by single developer who now knows the constraint; comment is sufficient
Script tag after HTML content on trading.html; impact <100ms on normal connections; CDN caching for repeats
display=swap prevents blank page; preconnect hints reduce latency; standard Google Fonts practice
Browser caching handles repeat loads; CDN returns immutable cache headers; standard static site pattern

dispute.reason: GitHub Pages API custom_404 field reflects UI settings, not Jekyll behavior; 404.md with permalink /404.html produces valid custom error page that GitHub Pages auto-serves
